words.meaning: country house / dacha — a rural cottage for weekends and summer
words.example: Летом мы ездим на дачу каждые выходные.
words.exampleMeaning: In summer we go to the dacha every weekend.

words.meaning: Russian bathhouse / sauna — traditional steam bath with birch branches
words.example: По субботам мы ходим в баню.
words.exampleMeaning: On Saturdays we go to the bathhouse.

words.example: Бабушка всегда ставила самовар для гостей.
words.exampleMeaning: Grandma always set up the samovar for guests.

words.meaning: blini / Russian crepes — thin pancakes, often with smetana or caviar
matryoshka / nesting doll — wooden dolls nested inside each other
words.exampleMeaning: The matryoshka is one of the symbols of Russia.

words.meaning: valenki — traditional Russian felt boots for winter
words.example: В деревне зимой все носят валенки.
words.exampleMeaning: In the village everyone wears valenki in winter.

words.meaning: ushanka — fur hat with ear flaps
words.example: В мороз без ушанки не обойтись.
words.exampleMeaning: You can't do without an ushanka in the frost.

words.meaning: Maslenitsa — Butter Week, a spring festival before Lent
words.example: Масленица — весёлый праздник с блинами и гуляниями.
words.exampleMeaning: Maslenitsa is a fun holiday with blini and festivities.

words.meaning: troika — a traditional three-horse sleigh; also means 'three'
words.example: Зимой катались на тройке по снегу.
words.exampleMeaning: In winter they rode a troika through the snow.

words.meaning: pelmeni — Russian dumplings filled with meat
words.exampleMeaning: Pelmeni are a favorite dish of many Russians.

words.meaning: borscht — beetroot soup, a staple of Russian cuisine
kvass — traditional fermented drink made from bread
words.exampleMeaning: In summer everyone drinks cold kvass.

words.meaning: balalaika — a triangular three-stringed Russian instrument
words.example: Он играет на балалайке с детства.
words.exampleMeaning: He has been playing the balalaika since childhood.

words.meaning: Kremlin — a fortified complex; most famously the Moscow Kremlin
words.example: Красная площадь находится рядом с Кремлём.
words.exampleMeaning: Red Square is next to the Kremlin.

words.meaning: birch tree (diminutive) — a symbol of Russia
words.example: Белые берёзки растут по всей России.
words.exampleMeaning: White birch trees grow all over Russia.

words.meaning: Grandfather Frost — the Russian equivalent of Santa Claus
words.example: Дед Мороз приносит подарки на Новый год.
words.exampleMeaning: Grandfather Frost brings presents on New Year's.

items.sentence: ___ приносит подарки на Новый год. (Grandfather Frost)
